title: features.json (recommended template)
description: Recommended schema for the default plan-implement-review workflow's item manifest. This is NOT a harness contract — the harness treats item objects as opaque (Issue 2). The harness requires only that the file is valid JSON, that items_list extracts an array, and that items_id extracts a stable string ID per item. All fields below are user data consumed by prompt templates via {{item}} traversal; no harness-state fields are present (Issue 3). Users with different mental models (tasks, stories, modules) should define their own schema.

project.description: Project name. Informational; not read by the harness.

needs_more_planning.description: Optional planner-emitted flag. Consumed by a post: command (e.g. check-needs-more-planning) via the action grammar. Not interpreted by the harness directly.

id.description: Stable item identifier. No pattern enforced by the harness; the default workflow recommends 'feat-<slug>' but any string is valid (Issue 2).

category.description: Grouping label. Rendered by the dashboard via items_display config.

depends_on.description: Item IDs this feature depends on. Used by the harness for topological ordering when items_depends_on is configured on the stage (D08).

acceptance_criteria.description: Planner-defined acceptance criteria. Accessed by review prompt templates via {{item.acceptance_criteria}}.

review_criteria.description: Planner-defined review criteria. Accessed by review prompt templates via {{item.review_criteria}}.
